title: C4 model — attachment-lifecycle
_recalibrationNote_v2_2026-05-04: C2 IncomingStore + C5 GarbageCollector removed; binary lifecycle owned by repo-incoming-attachments spec. attachment-lifecycle reads existing IncomingPaths module (read-only consumer).

systems.name: opencode session subsystem
systems.description: Per-session conversation, attachment storage, and tool routing

containers.name: Session sqlite storage
containers.description: Holds messages, parts, attachments table (binary blobs)

containers.name: Repo incoming (owned by repo-incoming-attachments)
containers.description: Per-project repo-attached storage owned by repo-incoming-attachments spec. attachment-lifecycle reads only via IncomingPaths.projectRoot() + part.repo_path. No writes from this spec.

components.name: DehydrationHook
components.description: Runs after assistant message reaches finish='stop'. Scans the parent user message for image attachment_ref parts; for each, moves binary to incoming staging and rewrites the part with annotation + dehydrated=true.

components.name: IncomingPathsConsumer
components.description: (v2 2026-05-04) Read-only consumer of repo-incoming-attachments' IncomingPaths namespace. Resolves <worktree>/<repo_path> for the reread tool. attachment-lifecycle does NOT write here; binary placement is handled at upload time by routeOversizedAttachment per repo-incoming-attachments phase 2.5**.

components.name: RereadAttachmentTool
components.description: Tool exposing IncomingStore.get to the model. Returns a fresh image content block on success; structured error on missing/expired.

components.name: WireFormatTransformer
components.description: Converts MessageV2 parts to AI SDK content blocks. Branches on attachment_ref.dehydrated: true → emit <dehydrated_attachment> text block; false → emit image_url block as today.

components.name: GarbageCollector
components._supersededBy: DD-4' — no GC needed; binary lifecycle user-managed via repo
components.description: (v1 SUPERSEDED 2026-05-04) Removed. Binaries persist in <worktree>/incoming/ for the lifetime of the project; user manages cleanup via git clean / .gitignore / rm.

components.name: AnnotationExtractor
components.description: Pure function: takes assistant response text → returns trimmed annotation (≤ 4000 chars, head+tail truncation if longer). DD-12.

relationships.description: (v1 SUPERSEDED) put(sid, filename, bytes) — removed; binary already in repo via repo-incoming upload path
(v2 2026-05-04) Updates attachment_ref part: sets dehydrated=true + annotation. repo_path / sha256 are NOT touched (already populated by repo-incoming upload path).
(v2 2026-05-04) Resolves abs path via IncomingPaths.projectRoot() + part.repo_path; reads bytes via fs.readFile.
Returns image content block as tool result
Reads attachment_ref parts during messages → ModelMessage conversion
post-completion lifecycle event triggers dehydration hook
relationships.technology: Bus event or inline call from processor
